summary: Comprehensive testing completed for GITB LMS. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend landing page and login flow verified. Admin login with taiwojos2@yahoo.com / Passw0rd@1 works and redirects to admin dashboard with course management.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with taiwojos2@yahoo.com / Passw0rd@1 successful (200)
GET /api/courses/{course_id} - Admin can get course details (200)
POST /api/applications/create - Creates application with Stripe checkout URL (200)
GET /api/auth/me - Returns current admin user info (200)
Frontend Landing Page - Displays all sections correctly
Frontend Login Page - Login form works with data-testid attributes
Frontend Admin Login - Successfully redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend Admin Dashboard - Shows stats, quick actions, recent users
Frontend Admin Courses - Course management with Add Course button and course list

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Landing page, login, and admin dashboard verified

seed_data_creation: Test courses created via pytest (TEST-* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Backend API health check (/api/system-config) works. 2) Admin login with taiwojos2@yahoo.com / Passw0rd@1 works. 3) Course CRUD operations work for admin. 4) Public courses endpoint works. 5) Application submission with Stripe checkout works (returns live checkout URL). 6) Landing page displays correctly with all sections. 7) Login page redirects admin to /admin dashboard.
